block_00:
3 reasons why you should
keep a trading journal
block_01: Every trader wants to know the secret to success. And every successful trader knows there is no secret: trading is about having a plan and knowing what tools you need to execute it.
block_02: A trading journal is a powerful tool meant to help you become a stronger trader. At first glance, keeping a journal may seem tedious and time-consuming. Nonetheless, recording your trades teaches consistency and discipline, both of which can pay off in the the long run.
block_03: Let’s delve deeper into the ways a trading journal can be useful.
